chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S-33 of 2026 Applicant: Amjad Ali s/o Dhani Bux Gahelo (on bail) through Mr. Babar Ali Panhwar, Advocate. Complainant: Mst. Haseena d/o Muhammad Hassan through Mr. Mazhar Ali Leghari, Advocate. The State: through Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G Date of hearing: 15.04.2026 Date of Order: 15.04.2026 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA J:- Through instant Bail Application, applicant named above seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.10 of 2025 registered under Section 302 PPC at Police Station Jakhri, after his bail plea was declined by the learned Additional Sessions Judge, Matiari vide order dated 08.12.2025. 2. The details and particulars of the F.I.R. are already available in the bail application and F.I.R., same could be gathered from the copy of F.I.R. attached with such application, hence need not to reproduce the same hereunder. 3. At the outset, complainant Mst. Haseena (CNIC No.41801-0672600-4), deceased’s son namely Ali Hassan son of Muhammad Hassan (CNIC No.41801-0894870-9) and Mst. Taj widow of deceased (CNIC No.Nil) are present in Court along with their counsel and state that they have No Objection if the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant/accused is confirmed. 4. On the other hand, learned D.P.G in the light of No Objection extended by the complainant and L.Rs of the deceased has also recorded his No Objection. 5. Heard learned counsel for the parties and D.P.G. The offence with which the applicant is charged is compoundable. Per both the counsel in order to bury their hatchets and due to intervention of their Nekmards, the complainant and the legal heirs of the deceased have submitted their No Objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant.

The offence with which the applicant is charged is compoundable. Per both the counsel in order to bury their hatchets and due to intervention of their Nekmards, the complainant and the legal heirs of the deceased have submitted their No Objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant. Accordingly, the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 12.01.2026 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. The applicant / Page 2 of 2 accused is however directed to attend the trial. In case of his failure, the trial Court would be at liberty to take action in accordance with law. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
